meta.title: Advancing Innovation and Healthcare in India
meta.description: A conference on the Modi administration's efforts to improve public healthcare in India, and opportunities for private sector coordination. Speakers included Ambassador Taranjit Singh Sandhu, Ambassador Husain Haqqani, Amit Kapoor, Ranjana Smetacek, Kevin Walker, Amiee Aloi, Jeffrey Hamilton, and Jeremiah Norris.
